---
title: "CV"
---

::: {.section-title}
## CV

A downloadable CV can be added as `assets/Mesfin_Genie_CV.pdf` and linked below.
:::

[Download CV](assets/Mesfin_Genie_CV.pdf){.btn-site .btn-primary}

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### Appointment
Senior Lecturer in Health Economics, Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle.
:::
::: {.card}
### Education
PhD in Economics, Ca’ Foscari University of Venice; MSc in Health Economics and Management, University of Bologna; MSc in Economics, Addis Ababa University; BA in Economics, Jimma University.
:::
::: {.card}
### Prior roles
Research and teaching positions at Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, University of Aberdeen, Auburn University, and Duke University.
:::
::: {.card}
### Fields
Health economics, behavioural economics, DCEs, eye tracking, clinical outcomes assessment, and health preference research.
:::
:::
